text:
Last comment:

I attached the 9.3 i386 log to show that the issue was resolved however I also build tested successfully on the following jails in Poudriere:

8.4-RELEASE-p31      amd64
8.4-RELEASE-p31      i386
9.3-RELEASE-p17      amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p17      i386
10.1-RELEASE-p14     amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p14     i386
10.2-BETA2           amd64
10.2-BETA2           i386
11.0-CURRENT r284725 amd64
11.0-CURRENT r284725 i386
